function HandleISRError({ error }) {
    if (workAsyncStorage) {
        const store = workAsyncStorage.getStore();
        if (store?.isStaticGeneration) {
            if (error) {
                console.error(error);
            }
            throw error;
        }
    }
    return null;
}
